channel.title: Platform Metrics on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Platform Metrics on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Advanced platform metrics in Azure Monitor
item.description:
Azure Monitor now has advanced platform metrics in Public Preview starting July 15, 2026. The preview adds improved visibility into platform performance, resource health, and operational trends for supported Azure services.

  • Source: Azure Updates
